flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at University of Management and Technology fell 24% between 2021 and 2024 (387 → 294).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at University of Management and Technology fell 19% between 2021 and 2024 (41.2% → 33.3%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at University of Management and Technology fell 22% between 2016 and 2019 ($11.5k → $9.0k).
